loop1.title: Cumulative Energy
loop1.note: Showing month-to-date cumulative active and reactive energy from primary outgoing feeders; capacity/subsidy target is not measured for this panel.

loop1.note: Showing total apparent power and active/reactive breakdown from outgoing feeders; rated capacity and worst-peak markers are honest-blank because this panel asset has no nameplate rating (rated_kva) and no dedicated peak column.

loop1.note: Showing UPS and BPDB feeder demand — HHF feeder is not present in this panel's roster, so its series is blank.
